biography: Jessica Yu-Li Henwick (/ˈhɛnɪk/ HEN-ik; born 30 August 1992) is a British actress, writer, and director. She began her career in 2010 and is best known for her roles in Game of Thrones, Iron Fist, Love and Monsters, The Defenders, Silk, The Matrix Resurrections, The Gray Man, Glass Onion: A Knives Out Mystery, and The Royal Hotel. Her directorial debut, Bus Girl, was nominated for a BAFTA.
name: Jessica Henwick
